data.body: USER_APPROVAL (2026-04-20): User directive — 'Fixes recommended by bot-psychologist are approved' for all Category D intent-confirmed clusters. Cluster B fixes approved: (a) reviewer-base.md Step 3 export WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR, (b) .gitignore add .claude/artifacts/review-status. Build-review-agents.sh regen required.
